description: Truss system config — read by the Generator alongside the filled semantic_outline.json. Contains all fixed system defaults, constraints, and the output contract. Not derived from the user prompt.

coordinate_system.description: 2D truss in the [x, z] plane. Units: meters for coordinates, kN for forces.

supports.description: Support boundary conditions. Always pinned. Support positions are provided by the Interpreter in semantic_outline.json → geometry_truss → support_positions as [x, z] pairs.

loads.description: Load application rules. Load values (snow, wind, cladding) come from semantic_outline.json. These are the system-level rules for how they are assembled and applied.
loads.tributary_width_m: equals truss_spacing_m from semantic_outline.json → geometry_roof. If not provided, default to 1.0 m.

geometry_defaults.description: Fallback values for optional geometry fields not stated in the user prompt.
geometry_defaults.note: num_bays default is applied only when not provided by the Interpreter. Generator should scale this with span if possible: 1 bay per ~2m of span, minimum 4.

optimization.description: Default optimization step states — applied when semantic_outline.json → optimization_flags does not explicitly set a step. User flags always override these defaults.

ground_structure.description: Ground structure grid settings. Only active when semantic_outline.json → geometry_truss → typology is 'custom_ground_structure'.

material.description: Cross-section catalogue provided directly to the Generator as a list of Karamba3D profile strings (e.g. 'HEA100', 'HEA200'). The list is passed at runtime alongside this config. The Generator uses it as the discrete set of available profiles for member sizing — selecting the smallest profile whose area satisfies the stress and buckling constraints for each member.
material.source: Karamba3D cross-section catalogue — provided at runtime
material.format: List of profile name strings, ordered smallest to largest area

output.description: The exact output contract the Generator must produce. Matches the Karamba geometric_outline format.

schema.description: 2D truss in [x, z] plane. Units: m for coordinates, kN for forces. Supports are always pinned.
schema.line_elements: Array of members — each as {start: [x, z], end: [x, z], cross_section: 'profile_name'}. cross_section is the name string of the assigned profile from the catalogue.
schema.support: Array of support positions as [x, z] coordinate pairs
schema.loads: Array of combined ULS point loads as [x, z, Fz] at top chord node positions
